positive: An elegant celestial forest scene, rendered in a stylized nature-meets-mythology aesthetic. Central composition features a luminous, stylized glowing moon surrounded by delicate, bioluminescent flora and sweeping, silhouetted ancient tree roots. The color palette should be deep indigo and teal gradients, highlighted by brilliant pops of pale gold and glowing cyan light emanating from the plants. The style should mimic modern psychedelic art meets Art Nouveau etching, maintaining clean lines and strong, reversible contrast suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Atmospheric, detailed, symmetrical composition, perfect for central placement on apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, ugly, noise, oversaturated, cartoon, photo, realistic, low quality
